name_en: M81536 Green Cardholder New Pocket Wallet made of Monogram Macassar canvas, featuring iconic colors from designer Virgil Abloh to accentuate leather details. Functional card slots and compartments are integrated into the interior. Dimensions: 8 x 11 x 1 cm
